prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年（剔除2022年异常断档数据）最低位次约15455→15629→12471→16183，整体呈波动上升趋势，近两年在1.2万–1.6万区间震荡；2025年基准约16183名，较2024年明显后移约3700名；该校在陕西省理科/物理类招生计划2021–2023年均为50人，2024年缩减至47人，2025年进一步减至45人；2026年计划48人，较2025年扩招3人（+6.67%），扩幅有限，对竞争缓解作用不大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第107位（2025年第109位），排名稳中有升，属中上游211层次；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音综合热度排名第93位（评价"一般"），短视频平台关注度不高，未出现爆款传播事件；该校以工科见长，电气工程、机械工程、材料科学等为传统优势方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类等工科专业2026年社会热度持续高位（高热推荐/推荐），与该校工科定位契合，有利于维持报考热度；陕西省物理类考生2026年约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34032人（+19.7%），竞争压力显著加大；该校校址位于天津市（非河北省内），在陕西省属跨省招生，无本地保护性倾斜；近年该校在陕招生计划约45–50人，占比较小，受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次16183、2026年小幅扩招3人（+6.67%）以及陕西省物理类考生大幅增加约19.7%三大因素，竞争加剧是主导方向；扩招带来的位次后移效应叠加考生规模激增的额外压力，预计最低录取位次进一步后移至约17000名，区间16500–17500名。

- 计算机科学与技术
- 通信工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间16500–17500名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（16500名以内）可重点冲刺电气工程、计算机等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（17500名附近）建议以三档保底专业为主，避免滑档风险。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025 (excluding the abnormal gap in 2022), the minimum ranking was approximately 15455 → 15629 → 12471 → 16183, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend, with recent two years oscillating between 12,000 and 16,000; the 2025 baseline is about 16183, a significant backward shift of about 3700 positions compared to 2024; the university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Shaanxi was 50 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 47 in 2024, and further decreased to 45 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 48 students, an increase of 3 students (+6.67%) compared to 2025, a limited expansion that does little to alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 107th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (109th in 2025), with a stable and slightly rising position, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or admission gaps; ranked 93rd in Douyin comprehensive popularity (rated as 'average'), with low attention on short video platforms and no viral events; the university is known for engineering, with electrical engineering, mechanical engineering, and materials science as traditional strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science remain highly popular in 2026 (highly recommended/recommended), aligning with the university's engineering focus and helping maintain application heat; the number of Shaanxi physics category examinees in 2026 is about 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (+19.7%) compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Tianjin (not within Hebei Province), making it an inter-provincial enrollment in Shaanxi with no local protection bias; the enrollment plan in Shaanxi is about 45–50 students in recent years, a small proportion, with limited impact from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three major factors of the 2025 baseline ranking of 16183, a small enrollment expansion of 3 students (+6.67%) in 2026, and a significant increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi physics category examinees, intensified competition is the dominant trend; the backward shift effect from enrollment expansion combined with the additional pressure from the surge in examinees is expected to push the minimum admission ranking further back to about 17000, with a range of 16500–17500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology
- Communication Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Civil Engineering

- Safety Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 16500–17500, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 16500), you can focus on aiming for top majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 17500), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors to avoid the risk of falling out of the admission list.
